set.caption: Figure 13.13. Growth factor for density fluctuations in linear perturbation theory. The factor D is evaluated at z = 0 and normalized to a fixed amplitude $\delta \rho / \rho$ at a fixed high redshift. The solid line assumes negligible space curvature, the dashed line Λ = 0.

overrides.reason: Unified source has consecutive captions 'figure 13.13' and 'figure 13.14'; this block's OCR caption was 'figure 1 3. 1 4' but the raw text immediately before the caption states Figures 13.13 and 13.14 show growth factor and velocity factor respectively. The visual block preceding the velocity-factor caption is the growth-factor Figure 13.13 referenced from ch11.
